title: polygala paniculata
intro: Polygala paniculata, also known as Yuan Zhi or Polygala root, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Polygalaceae. It is a perennial herb native to China, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The root of the Polygala paniculata plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Polygala paniculata include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system.
